name: paperclip
description: AI agent orchestration (Claude Code / Codex / OpenCode + two Hermes flavours). Registers two adapters at deploy time: hermes_local (subprocess; @felipefontoura/paperclip-adapter-hermes-local-plus) for the full Hermes CLI, and hermes_gateway (HTTP; @felipefontoura/paperclip-adapter-hermes-gateway) for OpenAI-compatible passthrough. Hermes binary is copied into the paperclip-data volume from the nousresearch/hermes-agent image.

env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.prompt: OpenAI API key (used by codex CLI) — optional

env.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.prompt: Anthropic API key (used by claude CLI) — optional

env.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
env.prompt: OpenRouter API key (used by opencode CLI) — optional

env.name: HERMES_API_KEY
env.prompt: Hermes gateway bearer (deployed alongside the hermes stack)

env.name: HERMES_LOCAL_PLUS_VERSION
env.prompt: Version of @felipefontoura/paperclip-adapter-hermes-local-plus to install — leave blank to skip
